rules.message: Data retention period not specified. Under DPDP, data must not be kept longer than necessary.
Third-party data sharing detected. Verify if sharing aligns with the stated collection purpose.
Consent mechanism is unclear or vague. DPDP requires free, specific, informed, and unambiguous consent.
No user rights mentioned (e.g., right to withdraw consent, erasure). DPDP mandates these rights.
Data collection purposes not stated. DPDP requires clear disclosure of why data is collected.
Types of data collected are not specified. Transparency about collected data is required under DPDP.
